acquisition method: LTQ-Orbitrap Elite was operated in the data-dependent mode
alkylation reagent: 50 μL of 50 mM iodoacetamide (IAA) in the UA solution
alkylation concentration: 50 μL of 50 mM iodoacetamide (IAA) in the UA solution
cleavage agent: Glu-C was used to further shorten the peptide chain
collision energy: stepped normalized collision energy (sNCE)-HCD tandem mass was applied
enrichment method: Intact N-glycopeptides were enriched by zwitterionic hydrophilic interaction chromatography
fragmentation method: sNCE-HCD fragmentations enabled the determination of both peptide sequences and glycoform compositions
labeling: N-glycosite sites were localized by the 18O-labeling method
